## Version affected

- `anthropic-skills:project-studio` version: v?.?.?
- Runtime (Claude Code CLI / Cowork mode): ?

## What happened

Observed behavior. Include the exact prompt and the first ~20 lines of
response.

## What was expected

Expected behavior. Cite the atom, invariant, or plan section if known.

## Repro

Minimal steps.

## Scope

- [ ] Affects a running session (can it be worked around in the current session?)
- [ ] Affects setup wizard
- [ ] Affects resume
- [ ] Affects multi-project / parent mode
- [ ] Other
